title: lupsia galactites
intro: Lupsia galactites, also known as marsh clover or fenugreek, is a perennial legume native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, to treat digestive issues, wounds, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Lupsia galactites include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve blood sugar control, and support the immune system. Lupsia galactites is often prepared into teas, infusions, or dried capsules, and can also be used in traditional medicine as a poultice or topical application.
